policy.canonicalBoundary: No new event or echo should be treated as fully validated unless it is either already in the original seed dataset or has passed a later source-backed research review.
policy.stopCondition: If the next useful addition depends on a specific factual claim or nuanced structural comparison that cannot be defended confidently from stable knowledge, move it to research instead of writing it as canonical truth.
allowedNow: high-confidence retagging of existing seed content
draft candidate additions marked for validation
